title: Panic triggered at core.(*expressionRewriter).toColumn (planner/core/expression_rewriter.go:1737)
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

**Setup the database:**

```
CREATE TABLE t2 (vkey int, pkey int);
CREATE TABLE t6 (pkey int, c23 int);
```

**Testcase**
```
select
  LAST_VALUE(case when (ref_0.vkey > (
                                  select
                                      ref_13.c23 as c0
                                    from
                                      t6 as ref_13
                                    order by c0 desc
                                     limit 1)
                          ) then 1 else 0 end
                        ) over (partition by ref_0.pkey) as c2
from
  t2 as ref_0;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

No panic.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1
```
TiDB log:
```
[ERROR] [conn.go:736] ["connection running loop panic"] [conn=127] [lastSQL="select  
  LAST_VALUE(case when (ref_0.vkey > ( 
                                  select

                                    from 
                                      t6 as ref_13
                                    order by c0 desc
                                     limit 1)
                          ) then 1 else 0 end
            ) over (partition by ref_0.pkey) as c2
from 
  t2 as ref_0"] [err="runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1"] [stack="goroutine 43055 [running]:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t3 (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t4 (ref_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
INSERT INTO t4 (ref_id, amount) VALUES (1, 100.50), (2, 200.75), (3, NULL);
SELECT CASE WHEN (ref_0.value IS NOT NULL AND ref_0.id > (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ref_4.amount), 0) FROM t4 AS ref_4)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS result FROM t3 AS ref_0;
key_bug_features: LAST_VALUE with subquery causing index out of range panic
